channel.title: Postgresql on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Postgresql on Arrans github.io

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: dbeaver/dbeaver
item.description: Free universal database tool and SQL client

item.title: discourse/discourse
item.description: A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple.

item.title: clidey/whodb
item.description: A lightweight next-gen data explorer - Postgres, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, MariaDB, Elastic Search, and Clickhouse with Chat interface

item.title: calcom/cal.com
item.description: Scheduling infrastructure for absolutely everyone.

item.title: riverqueue/river
item.description: Fast and reliable background jobs in Go

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear, Monday, and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and cycles the easiest way on the planet.

item.title: neondatabase/neon
item.description: Neon: Serverless Postgres. We separated storage and compute to offer autoscaling, code-like database branching, and scale to zero.

item.title: maybe-finance/maybe
item.description: The personal finance app for everyone

item.title: chartdb/chartdb
item.description: Database diagrams editor that allows you to visualize and design your DB with a single query.

item.title: sosedoff/pgweb
item.description: Cross-platform client for PostgreSQL databases

item.title: teableio/teable
item.description: ✨ The Next Gen Airtable Alternative: No-Code Postgres

item.title: mfts/papermark
item.description: Papermark is the open-source DocSend alternative with built-in analytics and custom domains.

item.title: lukevella/rallly
item.description: Rallly is an open-source scheduling and collaboration tool designed to make organizing events and meetings easier.

item.title: RealOrangeOne/docker-db-auto-backup
item.description: A script to automatically back up all databases running under docker on a host

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: xyproto/algernon
item.description: Small self-contained pure-Go web server with Lua, Teal, Markdown, Ollama, HTTP/2, QUIC, Redis, SQLite and PostgreSQL support ++

item.title: danvergara/dblab
item.description: The database client every command line junkie deserves.

item.title: VityaSchel/lufin
item.description: Read-only mirror of https://git.hloth.dev/hloth/lufin

item.title: ruanbekker/cheatsheets
item.description: My Cheatsheet Repository
